title: More Menu
heading: Animal Husbandry
text:
# Animal Husbandry

To protect livestock and birds wealth of the state by extensive veterinary health coverage through prevention and control measure.To march towards self sufficiency in animal origin food i.e. milk, meat & egg and creation of avenues for self employment generation for unemployed youths as well as to bring additional income of farmers through various animal husbandry activities.

| SL. | Particulars | Nos. West District |
| 1 | No. of Veterinary Hospitals | 02 |
| 2 | No. of Veterinary Dispensary | 08 |
| 3 | No. of Veterinary Sub centre (First Aid centre/Stockman centre | 87 |
| 4 | No. of Veterinary AI Centre | 0 |

| 8 | Feed Mixing Plant | 02 |

| 10 | Frozen semen Bank | 01 |
| 11 | No. of Pig Breeding farm | 01 |
| 12 | No. of Goat Breeding farm | 0 |
| 13 | No. of Rabbit Breeding farm | 01 |
| 14 | No. of Duck Breeding farm | 01 |
| 15 | No. of Poultry Breeding farm | 02 |
| 16 | No. of Cattle Breeding farm | 01 |
| 17 | No. of Block Level brooder house (BLBH) | 08 |
| 18 | Government Fodder farm | 02 |
